heroHeading: Welcome to the Humanists of Greater Portland
heroTagline: A community of freethinkers dedicated to human well-being, scientific reason, and ethical living without supernatural beliefs.
humanismBody1: Humanism is a way of life that guides us to be well and to do good without relying on anything supernatural. It's a progressive philosophy that embraces reason, compassion, and the pursuit of knowledge.
humanismBody2: We welcome atheists, agnostics, truth-seekers, and anyone interested in exploring ethical living, critical thinking, and community building based on humanist principles.

features.title: Science & Reason
features.description: We value evidence-based thinking and scientific inquiry as paths to understanding our world.

features.title: Community
features.description: Building meaningful connections and supporting one another in our shared human experience.

features.title: Compassion
features.description: Promoting ethics, social justice, and care for all people through humanist values.

ctaBody: Become a member and connect with fellow humanists. Support our programs, scholarship funds, and community outreach initiatives.
